analytics.chartGapAnalysisExplanation: This chart directly compares mentee demand (red dots) and mentor supply (green dots) for each skill. The connecting lines show the gap, with values displayed in the middle. Skills are sorted by gap size (largest at top).
analytics.chartGapExplanation: This chart shows the gap between mentee demand and mentor supply for different skills. Larger bars indicate larger gaps between what mentees need and what mentors offer.
banner.intro: Looking to connect with a mentor for a one-on-one session?

cancellationPolicy.flexible: Any session cancelled 12h beforehand will be fully refunded. You will be partially refunded (75%) if you cancel less than 12h beforehand
cancellationPolicy.moderate: Any session cancelled 48h beforehand will be fully refunded. You will be partially refunded (50%), if you cancel 12 to 48h beforehand. No refunds accepted for cancellations 12h beforehand.
cancellationPolicy.strict: Any session cancelled 48h beforehand will be fully refunded. Cancellations less than 48h beforehand will not be refunded.
common.priority.high.description: Critical skills with significant impact on career growth and organizational success; addresses immediate needs or urgent skill gaps
common.priority.low.description: Beneficial skills that add value but are less urgent; can be developed over a longer timeframe
common.priority.medium.description: Important skills that enhance performance and career development; should be addressed in the medium term
conference.chatNewWindow: open chat in a new window
confirm.deleteAllImages: Are you sure you want to delete all of these images? This action is irreversable.
confirm.deleteAvailability: Are you sure you want to delete this availability?
confirm.deleteRecurringAvailability: Are you sure you want to delete this availability? All other occurrences of this availability will also be removed from your calendar.

confirm.leaveDirty: You have unsaved changes - are you sure you wish to leave this page?
confirm.makeRecurring: Do you want to make this availability recurring?

conversation.announcementReply: When replying to a read-only announcement, your message will be sent directly to the sender and will not be seen by the group.
conversation.announcementSender: This announcement will be sent to all members of this announcement group. Their replies will appear in a private conversation with you, and will not appear in this thread.
dashboard.insights.emergingThemes.helpTe: Identifies recurring patterns and key topics from mentorship conversations and feedback. These insights reveal what matters most to your participants and provide actionable recommendations to enhance program effectiveness.
dashboard.insights.goalsAnalysis.helpTex: Top goals mentees are striving to achieve through mentorship. Leverage these insights to empower mentees and guide them toward their fullest potential.
dashboard.insights.knowledgeGap.helpText: Assessment of skill alignment across your program. It spotlights the disconnect between mentee needs and mentor capabilities, and recommendations on how to close the gap with strategic action to drive better outcomes.
dashboard.insights.peopleSkillsBreakdown: Highlights the top skills identified by mentors and mentees, along with the industries represented across your program.
dashboard.insights.upskilling.recommenda: Key strategies to help mentees strengthen their skills, improve their performance, and accelerate their career growth.

seo.b2bDescription: Mentorly is the leading cloud-based mentorship solution for businesses and organizations looking to invest in their people.
seo.b2bMenteeDescription: {name} is taking part in {organisation}'s mentorship program.
seo.b2bMentorDescription: {name} is a mentor in {organisation}'s mentorship program.
seo.b2cDescription: Mentorly Marketplace is the leading platform for creative digital mentorship, providing access to 700+ international and vetted mentors. Find your mentor and unlock your potential today!
seo.greyLabelDescription: {program} is powered by Mentorly, the leading platform for digital mentorship, connecting emerging and seasoned creative professionals and entrepreneurs from around the world for meaningful, one-on-one mentorship.
seo.marketplaceMenteeDescription: {name} is a {role} from {location}. You can connect with them on Mentorly to help them learn more about {discipline}.
seo.marketplaceMentorDescription: {name}, {role}, is a mentor on Mentorly. You can connect with them to learn more about {discipline}.
seo.whiteLabelDescription: {program} is {organisation}'s mentorship program, whose mission is: {mission}

text.noConversations.description: Once a booking request comes through, the message between you and the other attendants will show here. When a Program Manager messages you, the thread between you two will show here as well.
text.noConversations.description.noGroup: Once a booking request comes through, the message between you and the other attendants will show here.
text.noConversations.description.onlyPee: Once you have a group session, a thread with those individuals will appear here. When a Program Manager messages you, the thread between you two will show here as well.
text.noConversations.description.PM: When you send a message to members, the threads will be created here. To send a message, go to the Members tab, click on the 3 dots on the right-side of the screen beside any member, and click Send message. That message will show up here. A feature coming soon: initiate to send messages to members from this tab, by program, by cohort, by tag.

text.reportAbuseModal: We're sorry to learn you're having a challenging session. Thank you for reporting your issue with our team. We will promptly investigate the issue and will follow up by email.

text.setRates: Set your hourly rate for your mentoring sessions (in USD). The 30-minute session rate is automatically set at 60% of your hourly rate.
text.singUpIntroduceMentorText: Showcase your talent, expertise, and skills. Don't forget to let your personality shine.
